# customerconnect_application (Resource)

Manages a NetFoundry Application (backed by a Ziti service).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connector_id` (String) Connector this application belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `name` (String) Display name of the application.

### Optional

- `addresses` (Attributes List) Service address mappings. Required for all connector types except SDK_EMBEDDED, where any supplied addresses are accepted but silently dropped. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--addresses))
- `description` (String) Description of the application.
- `enabled` (Boolean) When false, the application is not materialized into a Ziti service. Defaults to true.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol (`TCP`, `UDP`, or `TCP_UDP`). Required for all connector types except SDK_EMBEDDED, where it is accepted but silently dropped.
- `type` (String) Type of the application (e.g. HTTP, HTTPS, SSH) or 'custom'. Required for all connector types except SDK_EMBEDDED, where it is accepted but silently dropped.

### Read-Only

- `connector_model_id` (String) If set, this application is inherited from the referenced connector model and cannot be modified directly.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when this application was created.
- `created_by` (String) Identity that created this application.
- `deleted_at` (String) Timestamp when this application was deleted.
- `deleted_by` (String) Identity that deleted this application.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the application.
- `provider_id` (String) Provider this application belongs to.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when this application was last updated.
- `ziti_id` (String) Ziti service id of the primary service backing this application. Null while the application is disabled.
- `ziti_name` (String) Unique name used for the primary Ziti service, formatted as "<providerId>|<connectorId>|<name>". Derived from `name`, so it may change on update.

<a id="nestedatt--addresses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `addresses`

Required:

- `listen_address` (List of String) Listen addresses (hosts) for the intercept config.
- `listen_port` (List of String) Listen ports or port ranges for the intercept config.

Optional:

- `allowed_addresses` (List of String) Allowed forward addresses (IPs, CIDR blocks, or hostnames). Required when forward_address is true.
- `allowed_ports` (List of String) Allowed forward ports or port ranges. Required when forward_port is true.
- `forward_address` (Boolean) Forward the listening address.
- `forward_port` (Boolean) Forward the listening port.
- `target_address` (String) Target address for the host config. Required when forward_address is false.
- `target_port` (Number) Target port for the host config. Required when forward_port is false.

Read-Only:

- `ziti_id` (String) Ziti service id of the service backing this address.
